# Stack

Stack arranges its children in a vertical or horizontal line with equal spacing.

## Import

```jsx
import { Stack, HStack, VStack, StackSeparator } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Components

### Stack

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| direction | `"row" \| "column"` | `column` | Stack direction |
| gap | `string \| number` | `0.5rem` | Spacing between items |
| align | `string` | - | Align items |
| separator | `ReactNode` | - | Element between each item |

### HStack

Horizontal stack (shorthand for `<Stack direction="row">`).

### VStack

Vertical stack (shorthand for `<Stack direction="column">`).

### StackSeparator

A separator rendered between stack items.

## Usage

```jsx
<VStack gap={4} align="stretch">
  <Box p={4} bg="primary.100">Item 1</Box>
  <Box p={4} bg="primary.100">Item 2</Box>
</VStack>
```
